purpose: Run copied OpenAI NLP stages against MDA articles and normalize outputs into claims, citation, and falsification packets.

openai_runner.api_key_source: OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable preferred; no live key is stored in this station.

rules: Do not copy secret config.txt files from old OpenAI folders.
Candidate citations are not verified citations.
Every extracted claim needs a kill condition or gets flagged NEEDS_KILL_CONDITION.
Outputs are review packets until a human promotes them.
